# Sekoya Group Information and Technology

> Sekoya is a software development and technology consulting company specializing in custom software, mobile/web applications, IoT, AI/ML, and cloud solutions. Founded in 2024, we help businesses with digital transformation through end-to-end technology services.

- Website: https://sekoya.tech
- Email: info@sekoya.tech
- Phone: +90 507 743 83 21
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sekoya-tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/sekoyatech

## Services

- [Mobile & Web Application Development](https://sekoya.tech/services/mobile-web-development/): Native and cross-platform mobile apps (Flutter, React Native), responsive web applications, progressive web apps
- [Custom App Development](https://sekoya.tech/services/custom-app-development/): Tailored software solutions for specific business needs, enterprise applications, system integrations
- [Software Consultancy](https://sekoya.tech/services/software-consultancy/): Technical strategy, architecture review, technology stack advisory, code audit, and modernization planning
- [Project Management](https://sekoya.tech/services/project-management/): Agile/Scrum project management, delivery oversight, team coordination, and process optimization
- [IoT Solutions](https://sekoya.tech/services/iot-solutions/): Industrial IoT platforms, sensor integration, real-time monitoring dashboards, MQTT/edge computing
- [Machine Learning](https://sekoya.tech/services/machine-learning/): Predictive analytics, recommendation systems, data pipelines, ML model training and deployment
- [Artificial Intelligence](https://sekoya.tech/services/artificial-intelligence/): NLP, computer vision, generative AI integration, intelligent automation, AI-powered business solutions
- [DevOps & Cloud Services](https://sekoya.tech/services/devops-cloud/): CI/CD pipelines, cloud migration (AWS/Azure/GCP), Kubernetes, Docker, infrastructure as code, monitoring

## Company

- [About Us](https://sekoya.tech/about/): Company story, mission, vision, values, and milestones since 2024
- [Our Team](https://sekoya.tech/team/): Team members, expertise areas, and leadership
- [Portfolio](https://sekoya.tech/portfolio/): Case studies including Smart Factory IoT Platform and Enterprise CRM projects
- [Careers](https://sekoya.tech/careers/): Open positions, company culture, and benefits
- [Contact](https://sekoya.tech/contact/): Project inquiry form, email, phone, and social media links

## Blog

- [Blog](https://sekoya.tech/blog/): Articles on software development, technology trends, AI, IoT, and digital transformation
- [Welcome to Sekoya Blog](https://sekoya.tech/blog/welcome-to-sekoya-blog/): Company launch announcement and our vision
- [Modern Web Development in 2026](https://sekoya.tech/blog/modern-web-development-2026/): Current web technology landscape and trends
- [Why Custom Software Matters](https://sekoya.tech/blog/why-custom-software-matters/): Business case for custom vs off-the-shelf software

- [Privacy Policy](https://sekoya.tech/privacy-policy/): Data handling, cookies (none), analytics (Plausible, cookieless)
